CIML Meeting2006October 18, 2006

🇿🇦 Cape Town, South Africa

41st CIML Meeting — Decisions (EN)

Meeting DOI10.63493/meetings/ciml41
Meeting URNurn:oiml:ciml:meeting:ciml-41

ItemTitleOutcome

bOpening addressDiscussed
cRoll-call - QuorumDiscussed
dApproval of the agendaAdopted

2.1Situation of certain MembersDiscussed
3Financial mattersDiscussed

9.3Appointment of a new Assistant DirectorDiscussed

10Future meetingsDiscussed

OIML

International Organization of Legal Metrology

Legal metrology — the practice and science of measurement that affects trade, health, safety, and the environment.
